web_process.state: FastAPI server after a completed live address result
web_process.method: ps RSS for the running Python service

verified_address_queries.method: query.completed duration_ms values from the verified live trace

readiness_route.interpretation: One observation, not a latency benchmark. The route inspects Hermes with three command processes.

liveness_route.interpretation: Local process liveness only. The route does not inspect Hermes. This is not a concurrent latency benchmark.

limits: This is not a concurrent load test.
The City services and local machine state can change the results.
No Hermes model inference was profiled in this observation.
